title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the task of planting an idea.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham City into chaos.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality as he knows it is a simulation and joins a rebellion against its controllers.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble to undo Thanos's actions and restore order to the universe.
